rationale: Article VIII, Section 16 was repealed Nov. 6, 2001, and contains no operative text governing homestead exemption amounts. It imposes no restriction on increasing the Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption from $140,000 to $200,000.
_note: Cited constitutional section is repealed; no operative language remains to evaluate against the proposed change. Recommend scanning Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c) instead, which authorizes homestead exemptions.
